Localization.Description: Exploitation of the CVE-2024-23897 vulnerability in Jenkins. An attacker can read an arbitrary file via the Jenkins command-line interface by adding the "@" character to the file path.

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Exploitation of the CVE-2024-23897 vulnerability in Jenkins aimed at port {dst.port} of host {dst.ip}. An attacker can read file {datafield3} by adding the "@" character to the file path in the command-line interface on host {event_src.host}.
